species: circNFKB1 is a circular RNA, derived from NFKB1 gene, and expressed in the cytoplasm and nucleus of chondrocytes.
tissue: Human knee OA cartilage tissues were collected from patients with a history of knee OA after total knee replacement surgery.
cell_type: Primary chondrocytes were isolated from human cartilages...
disease_state: Inflammatory cytokines-induced activation of the nuclear factor κB (NF-κB) pathway plays a critical role in the pathogenesis of osteoarthritis (OA).
sample_source: patients with a history of knee OA after total knee replacement surgery
Human knee OA cartilage tissues were collected from patients with a history of knee OA after total knee replacement surgery.
age: For the in vivo experiments, 3-month-old male C57BL/6 mice (n = 20) were used.
